title: Federal Reserve Board - 2024 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This is an index page listing Federal Reserve FOMC press releases from 2024, including references to statements from September 18, November 7, and December 18, 2024. The source body is truncated and does not contain the full text of any FOMC statement. The actual policy decisions, vote tallies, and forward guidance language are not available in this source. This is a navigation/listing artifact, not a primary research source.
key_points: Source is a listing/index page for 2024 FOMC press releases, not the actual statements themselves
September 18, 2024 FOMC statement is listed but content is truncated/not provided
November 7, 2024 FOMC statement is listed but content is truncated/not provided
December 18, 2024 FOMC statement is listed but content is truncated/not provided
Economic projections from the December 17-18 FOMC meeting are referenced
Source body exceeded character limit, truncating access to the actual policy statements
This is an official Federal Reserve Board website (federalreserve.gov)
why_it_matters: This source serves only as an index to 2024 Fed policy statements. It provides no substantive content for research purposes. The actual FOMC statements (policy decisions, forward guidance, vote breakdowns) must be accessed from the individual linked pages. This listing page has no independent archival value.
macro_context: This listing page references three FOMC meetings from 2024 (September, November, December). Without the actual statement text, none of the policy decisions, rate changes, or forward guidance from these meetings can be verified or analyzed from this source alone.

issues_found: Source is a listing/index page per source_type field - per rule 6, listing pages should be rejected as they lack archival value
event_type incorrectly set to 'fomc_statement' when source is a listing page, not an actual FOMC statement

Record's own summary acknowledges 'the actual policy decisions and forward guidance language are not available in this source'
Record's notes explicitly state 'Non-archiveable listing page per rule 6' - contradicts being placed in review_queue
Published_at (2024-12-18) refers to the most recent listing update, not the publication dates of individual statements
This source alone is insufficient for research on 2024 Fed policy - only an index/listing

notes: Non-archiveable listing page per rule 6. The actual FOMC statement text from 2024 meetings is not included in this source - only dates and links are shown. The September 18, November 7, and December 18, 2024 FOMC statements are referenced but their content is not available here. This is a navigation/index artifact rather than a primary research source. Human review required to determine if individual FOMC statements should be archived separately.
